# Chromie

> Chromie is the deterministic stack for web agents — intelligence and reliability on the live web. Current automation either sacrifices intelligence for reliability, or reliability for intelligence. Chromie provides both through AI augmented with deterministic tooling.

Chromie helps teams automate web workflows for pharma market intelligence, clinical trial tracking, insurance payer portals, government contract search, and other production web agents that need both frontier-model reasoning and steps that must not fail.

## Product highlights

- Deterministic tool calls with a full audit trail — no opaque model calls deciding what happens next
- Build new automations with the Chromie agent or upgrade existing workflows with deterministic tools on top
- Runtime skill selection: the right skill at the right moment in the flow, based on task context
- Self-healing tools: when selectors break or the DOM drifts, tools detect failure and re-resolve targets automatically
- Execution replay and auditable actions for debugging, compliance, and explaining what happened and why
- Task-aware routing, bot detection evasion, and production guardrails that keep agents inside approved paths
- Past-run learning: mine execution history to turn patterns into permanent tooling

## Use cases

- Market intelligence for pharma
- Clinical trial tracking for clinical teams
- Payer portal automation for insurance
- Contract search for government contracting (GovCon) teams

## Main

- [Chromie Home](https://chromie.dev): Landing page and product overview
- [Use Cases](https://chromie.dev/use-cases): Industry workflow examples and demos
- [Book a demo](https://cal.com/chromie): Schedule a product walkthrough
- [GovCon onboarding](https://chromie.dev/gov/onboarding): Free self-serve setup for government contract search
- [Blog](https://chromie.dev/blog): Product updates and web automation insights

- [Book demo page](https://chromie.dev/book-demo): Demo request landing page
